module:
Integration tests for metadata transformation across subsystem boundaries.

These tests verify that metadata is properly preserved during cross-system 
conversions, particularly in round-trip scenarios where data passes through
multiple subsystems.

test_metadata_preservation_in_roundtrip.docstring: Test that metadata is preserved in round-trip conversions.

test_nested_metadata_handling.docstring: Test that deeply nested metadata structures are preserved.

test_empty_metadata_handling.docstring: Test conversions with null or empty metadata.

test_metadata_source_type_tracking.docstring: Test that source type information is preserved in metadata.

test_cross_system_metadata_consistency.docstring: Test metadata consistency across all three systems.
